steps.title: Use the function definition
steps.content: The function $s(t)$ gives the approximate mass, in grams, that remains $t$ years after the sample starts to decay.

steps.title: Interpret the ordered pair
steps.content:
The statement $s(62)=30$ means that when $t=62$ years, the remaining mass is $30$ grams. It is not the mass lost, and the time is not $30$ years.
The answer is A.
